form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation 15th of 19 at Flemington Bm78 September 13 over 1100m, 7 len behind Persian Spirit with 54.5kg at $91. Previous preparation first-up won by neck Sandown-Hillside 3yo Bm64 July 16 over 1000m slow track defeating Don't Russia carrying 58.5kg at $9. Respecting.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-12). Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation 15th of 19 at Flemington Bm78 September 13 over 1100m, 7 len behind Persian Spirit with 54.5kg at $91. Previous preparation first-up won by neck Sandown-Hillside 3yo Bm64 July 16 over 1000m slow track defeating Don't Russia carrying 58.5kg at $9. Respecting.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Knuckled on jumping away. In the straight, laid out under pressure.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of eight months. Finished off last campaign tenth of 13 at Sandown-Lakeside Bm70 August 20 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Princess Que carrying 58kg at $21. When resuming last campaign eighth of 10 at this track Bm64 June 12 over 1106m, soft track; 7 len behind De Bergerac with 59.5kg at $4.80. Handy mare who can figure.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of eight months. Finished off last campaign tenth of 13 at Sandown-Lakeside Bm70 August 20 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Princess Que carrying 58kg at $21. When resuming last campaign eighth of 10 at this track Bm64 June 12 over 1106m, soft track; 7 len behind De Bergerac with 59.5kg at $4.80. Handy mare who can figure.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Did not obtain clear running in the straight and was not tested.
Slow to begin. Held up for clear running from the 500m until passing the 350m.
Raced greenly under pressure in the straight.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five months. Finished off last preparation second last of 10 at Caulfield Heath F&M Bm70 November 12 over 1200m, soft track; 6 len behind Wings Of Desire carrying 58kg at $16. Previously first up; third of 8 at Mornington Bm62 September 18 over 1000m, 6 len behind Bazaball Rewarded carrying 58kg at $9. Can take some catching.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five months. Finished off last preparation second last of 10 at Caulfield Heath F&M Bm70 November 12 over 1200m, soft track; 6 len behind Wings Of Desire carrying 58kg at $16. Previously first up; third of 8 at Mornington Bm62 September 18 over 1000m, 6 len behind Bazaball Rewarded carrying 58kg at $9. Can take some catching.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 800m, raced tight for a short distance to the inside of Derelict.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming 2nd in a small field at this track Mdn-Sw on March 1 over 1012m, on a wet track; 1.3 len behind Paris Winds carrying 59.5kg at $1.70. Second-up favourite; won by 6 len at Bairnsdale Mdn-Sw March 22 over 1000m on a soft track defeating Sapphire Reign carrying 59.5kg at $1.50. Impressed last start. Can measure right up to this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(6.5). Third-up today. Resuming 2nd in a small field at this track Mdn-Sw on March 1 over 1012m, on a wet track; 1.3 len behind Paris Winds carrying 59.5kg at $1.70. Second-up favourite; won by 6 len at Bairnsdale Mdn-Sw March 22 over 1000m on a soft track defeating Sapphire Reign carrying 59.5kg at $1.50. Impressed last start. Can measure right up to this.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of eight months. Finished off last preparation by neck Bendigo Bm64 August 14 over 1100m slow track defeating Furosshi with 58.5kg at $13. Previously first up; sixth of 10 at Moe Bm58 June 19 over 1000m, soft track; 3 len behind New York Star carrying 60.5kg at $2.45. Not the worst.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4). Resuming after a break of eight months. Finished off last preparation by neck Bendigo Bm64 August 14 over 1100m slow track defeating Furosshi with 58.5kg at $13. Previously first up; sixth of 10 at Moe Bm58 June 19 over 1000m, soft track; 3 len behind New York Star carrying 60.5kg at $2.45. Not the worst.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin. Raced keenly in the early stages.
Reared as the start was effected and lost considerable ground (5L).

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last preparation sixth of 16 at Caulfield in the G3 Thbrd Club November 15 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Inkaruna with 56kg at $41. On debut won by 0.5 len Pakenham Mdn-Sw October 17 over 1000m slow track defeating Conflict with 55kg at $3.70. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Form last time reads very well for this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7.5). Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last preparation sixth of 16 at Caulfield in the G3 Thbrd Club November 15 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Inkaruna with 56kg at $41. On debut won by 0.5 len Pakenham Mdn-Sw October 17 over 1000m slow track defeating Conflict with 55kg at $3.70. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Form last time reads very well for this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin and then hampered after the start.
Raced three-wide without cover. Passing the 900m, bumped.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when won by 0.8 len at Moe 3yo Mdn-Sw November 16 over 1100m on a soft track defeating Kippis carrying 56kg at $7.50. Can improve this time in and remain unbeaten.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(5.5). Resumes from a spell after only one run when won by 0.8 len at Moe 3yo Mdn-Sw November 16 over 1100m on a soft track defeating Kippis carrying 56kg at $7.50. Can improve this time in and remain unbeaten.

form.formComment: Most recently 4th of 7 at this track 0 - 62 on March 29 over 1000m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind She Daresthe Devil with 54kg at $41. The race before that 4th of 11 at Bairnsdale 0 - 62 on March 22 over 1000m, 4.5 len behind Buvelot carrying 54kg at $41. Won't find this easy.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4). Most recently 4th of 7 at this track 0 - 62 on March 29 over 1000m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind She Daresthe Devil with 54kg at $41. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running from the 400m until approaching the 200m.
Held up for clear running from the 500m until passing the 350m.
